title: Asset Manifest Entry
description: One asset in the global catalog. Tools resolve assets by id via host.assets.get(). The id is a forever-stable contract; the version moves.

id.description: Namespaced. e.g. 'suse/logo/primary', 'event/kubecon-2026/badge'. NEVER changes. NEVER reused for a different asset.

version.description: SemVer. Bump on every byte change. Drives cache invalidation.

tier.description: core = always bundled with app; catalog = synced at launch, cached; on-demand = fetched when used.

tags.description: Used by host.assets.query() and pickers to filter.

formats.description: Available format variants. The host picks the right one based on use.

url.description: Relative to the catalog root, or absolute. Used by host to fetch bytes.

size.description: Bytes. Used for sync progress estimation.

locales.description: Locale-specific format overrides. Key is BCP-47 locale tag. Value mirrors the 'formats' structure.

deprecated.description: Soft-deprecate before removal. Existing references still resolve.

replacedBy.description: If deprecated, asset id that supersedes this one.

prefetch.description: Catalog tier only. If true, fetch bytes at sync time, not on first use.
